title: EntityCurrentStateRecord
description: A durable per-entity current-state card. Card CONTENT (north_star, current_priority, owner, waiting_on, braydon_next_action) is authored by the model or human. Code owns only the schema, the append-only store, and the mechanical resolution of effective_at / stale_after / supersedes / status into the read model. This is the SHARED store both Elena/WKM and Sam write.

entity_id.description: Stable entity key, e.g. braydon, lfw, synthyra.

current_priority.description: Near-term focus. Model/human authored. May differ from north_star at a different horizon (see Synthyra).

waiting_on.description: Who/what the entity is blocked on. Empty string when nothing. Suppresses promotion to a Braydon action.

braydon_next_action.description: Specific next action that is Braydon's, or empty when none is his.

effective_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp; the card is not yet valid before this instant.

stale_after.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp; past this the card is flagged stale (decay) and loses precedence.

supersedes.description: Id of the prior record this one replaces, or null. Supersede = new record referencing prior.

source_refs.description: folio / wkm-status / tracker / state-system uris the content is anchored to.

confidence.description: Model/human authored qualitative confidence. Not a computed score.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp the record was authored.
